title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in even after resetting password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted payment but transaction was declined.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Invoice download button is not responding from billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Updated billing address is not reflecting correctly in profile.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Refund was requested two weeks ago but not received yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: User not receiving OTP for 2FA verification.

title: Profile Picture Not Updating
description: New profile image upload shows error and does not save.

title: Email Notifications Not Working
description: User is not receiving important system notifications.

title: Dashboard Loading Slowly
description: Dashboard takes more than 20 seconds to fully load.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer requested password reset but email never arrived.

title: Order History Missing
description: Previous purchase history not visible in account.

title: Dark Mode Not Saving
description: Theme switches back to light mode after refresh.

title: Error 500 on Checkout
description: Server error appears when attempting to complete checkout.
